sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Current state: col 0=33, col 1=18, col 2=no match, col 3=20, col 4=6
# Cursor at col 4. Let me try setting col 2 to top 6 (3 UP presses)
# This would give: 33, 18, 6, 20, 6

# Go to col 2 and set to top 6
action(['LEFT', 'LEFT', 'UP', 'UP', 'UP'])

seg = current_frame.segmentation
current_hashes = {}
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'B' and 49 <= n['id'] <= 53:
        current_hashes[n['id']] = n['hash']

top_p = {'6': 'cddd7d2c6a6ceea0', '8': 'd38ad0a046a963a0', '18': 'fb80c9b281b063da', 
         '20': 'f4469c244897540c', '31': '12ee96cc93cd3e0a', '33': 'b4edb3faf810133b'}

print("After setting col 2 to top 6:")
for col in range(5):
    tile_id = 49 + col
    h = current_hashes[tile_id]
    match = [k for k, v in top_p.items() if v == h]
    print(f"  Col {col}: matches top {match}")

print("\nResult:", last_action_result)
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
